final:
module dram_cell (
    input clk,
    input wr_en,
    input rd_en,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (wr_en) begin memory <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (rd_en) begin data_out <= memory ; end
  end
endmodule
